textPlain: > Me: If I want to blend 50% two images what should be the opacity of first image and opacity of second image?> GPT: To blend two images equally—so that each contributes 50% to the final result—you should set the opacity of both images to 50% when layering them. The combined visual contribution of both images should total 100%.It just keeps repeating this mistake no matter what I do. Btw correct answer is 100% opacity first and 50% opacity second. With 50%+50% the result is 75% opaque.
